message:
Running command: 
LIBPID=1100961
ORPID=1101105

# Start a CONTINUOUS and FAST pipe drainer to prevent the deadlock
# This reads from LibreLane's pipe fd 11 and saves the content
nohup bash -c "
LIBPID=$LIBPID
PIPE_PATH=/proc/\$LIBPID/fd/11
EXTRA_LOG=/tmp/drt2_pipe.log
echo 'Drainer started at \$(date)' > \"\$EXTRA_LOG\"
while [ -e \"\$PIPE_PATH\" ]; do
    dd if=\"\$PIPE_PATH\" bs=4096 count=32 >> \"\$EXTRA_LOG\" 2>/dev/null
    # If dd returns non-zero (pipe closed), exit
    [ \$? -ne 0 ] && echo 'Pipe closed at \$(date)' >> \"\$EXTRA_LOG\" && break
done
echo 'Drainer exited at \$(date)' >> \"\$EXTRA_LOG\"
" > /dev/null 2>&1 &
DRAINER_PID=$!
echo "Pipe drainer PID: $DRAINER_PID"

# Monitor progress
sleep 15
echo "=== Progress check $(date) ==="
tail -20 /tmp/drt2_pipe.log 2>/dev/null
echo "---"
RUN_DIR="/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper/runs/wrapper_run"
ls "$RUN_DIR/" | sort -V | tail -5
echo "---"
ps aux | grep openroad | grep -v grep | awk '{print "PID:"$2,"CPU:"$3"%","TIME:"$10}'
